answer: \boxed{Buffy falls out with her snooty friends because she realizes their shallow, self-centered priorities—like the school dance and social cliques—no longer align with her new responsibilities as a Slayer. Their indifference to the vampire attacks and Cassandra’s murder exposes their immaturity, while her emotional struggles and growth make her feel disconnected from their carefree lifestyle. Ultimately, their rejection of her when she tries to explain her changed life pushes her to sever ties with their toxic, superficial world.}
